title: hyparrhenia quinqueplex
intro: Hyparrhenia quinqueplex, also known as five-awned beard-grass, is a species of grass native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hyparrhenia quinqueplex include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be used in the form of a paste or poultice to accelerate healing and soothe skin irritations.
